name: Premier Investments Limited
analysis: PMV's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 34% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$14.4000. Trade idea: entry A$14.6500, stop A$13.4145, target A$18.3565 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
